# loop

> A Go TUI that runs an AFK (Away From Keyboard) implement-then-test cycle over issues using `opencode` as the agent CLI. Issues are local markdown files; the filesystem is the state machine.

## What is loop?

loop is a standalone Go binary that orchestrates autonomous agent loops. You write issues as markdown files. Loop picks one up, runs `opencode run` to implement it, then tests it in a separate pass. Issues move through directories (`issues/` → `test-ready/` → `done/`) as they change state. Optionally mirrors state to GitHub labels and issue state.

Follows the [Matt Pocock engineering skills](https://github.com/mattpocock) workflow pattern.

## Quickstart

```
loop setup          # interactive setup wizard (creates .loop/config.json)
loop run 10         # run 10 AFK iterations
loop status         # show pipeline state
loop                # open the TUI dashboard
```

## Issue State Machine

### States

| State | Directory | Description |
|---|---|---|
| todo | `docs/issues/` | Pending implementation |
| ready-for-agent | `docs/issues/ready-for-agent/` | Ready for agent (alternative to todo) |
| test-ready | `docs/issues/test-ready/` | Implemented, awaiting validation |
| done | `docs/issues/done/` | Passed validation |
| .quarantine | `docs/issues/.quarantine/` | Duplicates or agent failures |
| unable | `docs/issues/unable/` | Exceeded max retries (5) |

### Transitions

| From | Condition | To |
|---|---|---|
| todo/ready-for-agent | Implement + COMPLETE | test-ready |
| test-ready | Test + TEST_PASS | done |
| test-ready | Test + TEST_FAIL (retry < 5) | todo (stripped of results) |
| test-ready | Test + TEST_FAIL (retry >= 5) | unable |
| any | NO_MORE_TASKS | .quarantine |

### Execution Modes

- **AFK-only** — autonomous, selected by the agent
- **HITL-only** — human-in-the-loop, never run autonomously (produces NO_MORE_TASKS)
- **Combo** — never selected (returns ErrNoIssues)

## Issue File Format

```markdown
# NN - Feature title

GitHub: #14
Status: ready-for-agent
Execution mode: AFK-only
Branch: feature-branch
Checksum: abc123...
Type: feat
Retry: 0

## What to build

Description.

## User stories covered

...

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion one
- [ ] Criterion two

## UAT Plan

| Step | Description | Output | Expected | Result |

## Blocked by

- None

## Test Results

(added by implementing agent)

## UAT Results

(added by testing subagent)
```

### Headers

The header block sits between the `# Title` line and the first `## Section`. Recognized headers: `Status`, `Execution mode`, `GitHub`, `Checksum`, `Type`, `Branch`, `Retry`.

Required sections (every issue): `What to build`, `User stories covered`, `Acceptance criteria`, `UAT plan` (5-column table), `Blocked by`.

Disallowed sections by state:
- **todo**: `UAT Results`
- **test-ready**: `UAT Results` (empty placeholders stripped)
- **ready-for-agent**: `Test Results`, `UAT Results`

### Section Lifecycle

1. Implementing agent writes `## Test Results` before COMPLETE
2. Testing subagent writes `## UAT Results` before TEST_PASS/TEST_FAIL
3. On TEST_FAIL, loop strips both sections before moving to todo/

## CLI Commands

All commands via `cmd/loop/main.go`. Uses Go `flag` package (no Cobra).

### Global Flags

| Flag | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--timeout <secs>` | 0 | Override agent timeout |
| `--repair` | true | Repair GitHub state on iterations |
| `--headless` | false | Run without TUI for scripting/CI |

### Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `loop` | Start Bubbletea TUI dashboard (5 pages) |
| `loop setup` | Interactive setup wizard: issue dir, GitHub repo, branch |
| `loop run <n> [num]` | Run N AFK iterations; optionally force issue #num on iteration 1 |
| `loop status` | Read-only TUI pipeline status viewer |
| `loop check` | Validate pipeline: duplicates, headers, sections, checksums |
| `loop repair` | Auto-repair: missing labels, stuck files, checksums |
| `loop restore` | Restore git context after interrupted run |
| `loop upgrade` | Self-upgrade to latest GitHub release |
| `loop checksum verify` | Verify all SHA-256 checksums |
| `loop completion bash` | Print bash completion script |
| `loop commands` | Print command table |
| `loop screenshot` | Save ANSI-stripped terminal screenshot |

### Exit Codes

- 0: Success
- 1: General error (pre-flight, config, checksum)
- 2: Unknown command or invalid args

## Configuration

`.loop/config.json` — found by walking up for `.git` or `go.mod`.

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `repo` | string | `""` | GitHub owner/name; empty = local-only |
| `issue_dir` | string | `"docs/issues"` | Path to issue files |
| `branch_origin` | string | `"main"` | Default branch for branches |
| `agent_timeout` | int | 300 | Agent timeout in seconds |
| `inactivity_warn` | int | 60 | Seconds before inactivity warning |
| `inactivity_recover` | int | 120 | Seconds before inactivity kill |
| `checksums_enabled` | bool | true | Enable SHA-256 checksums |
| `branch_from_origin` | bool | false | Create branches from origin/ |

## Agent Protocol

### Invocation

`opencode run --dangerously-skip-permissions`

Input (stdin): `## Role: <role>\n\n<issue_content>\n\n<system_prompt>`

Working directory: configured issue directory.

### Promise Markers (Sentinel Protocol)

```
__LOOP_RESULT__
COMPLETE
__LOOP_RESULT_END__
```

Tokens: `COMPLETE` (implement → test-ready), `TEST_PASS` (test → done), `TEST_FAIL` (test → todo), `NO_MORE_TASKS` (both → quarantine).

Parsing: bottom-up scan for last `__LOOP_RESULT__`, then first `__LOOP_RESULT_END__` after it. Case-sensitive exact match.

### Commit Message Sentinels

```
__LOOP_COMMIT__
feat: short summary

Detailed description of what changed and why.
__LOOP_COMMIT_END__
```

Type must be: `feat`, `fix`, `bug`, `enhancement`, `chore`, `test`, `docs`.

### Recovery

If no valid promise marker found:
1. Print warning with last 200 bytes of stdout
2. Re-invoke agent with recovery prompt (30s timeout)
3. Default to TEST_FAIL if recovery fails

### Inactivity Watchdog

- Check interval: `min(warn, recover) / 2` (floor 1s)
- `inactivity_warn`: prints "agent appears stalled" (once)
- `inactivity_recover`: kills process group with SIGKILL, attempts recovery

### Stdout Buffering

- Full stdout preserved in result (unlimited)
- Promise parsing scans last 1 MB if output exceeds limit

## Pipeline Orchestration

### Issue Selection Priority

1. Test-ready files (unblocked, no populated UAT Results) → role = test
2. Ready-for-agent files (unblocked, AFK-only) → role = implement
3. Todo files (unblocked, AFK-only) → role = implement
4. HITL-only files → role = implement (fallback, produces NO_MORE_TASKS)

### Pre-Flight Checks (errors block pipeline)

- Duplicate filenames, GitHub numbers, or titles across states
- Self-blocking or dead blocker references

### Pre-Flight Checks (warnings only)

- Missing GitHub/Checksum/Type/Branch headers
- Title pattern mismatch
- Missing/invalid Execution mode
- Missing/disallowed sections
- Populated UAT Results in test-ready (stuck files)
- Checksum mismatch

### Repair Actions

1. Add missing `Status: ready-for-agent` to todo files
2. Add missing `Execution mode: AFK-only`
3. Strip empty `## UAT Results` placeholders
4. Report stuck test-ready files (no auto-promote)
5. Promote todo files with `## Test Results` to test-ready/
6. Flag invalid execution modes (no auto-fix)
7. Add/update SHA-256 checksums

### Retry System

- `MaxRetries = 5` (stored in `Retry:` header)
- Inactivity kill: retried with `i--`; at >= 5, move to `unable/`
- TEST_FAIL: stripped sections, moved to todo/ with incremented retry; at >= 5, move to `unable/`

## Git Safety

### Stash Flow

1. `git stash push --include-untracked -m "loop-auto-save <timestamp>"`
2. Fallback: `git stash create` + `git stash store` (plumbing)
3. Final fallback: binary diff to `.git/loop-autosave.patch`
4. On conflict: `ErrStashConflict` (stash preserved)

### Branch Management

- Temp branch naming: `loop/<slug>`
- Merge strategy: `--ff-only` → `--no-edit` → `--abort` on failure
- Context persisted to `.loop/git-context.json`: `{"OriginalBranch": "...", "Stashed": true}`

## GitHub Integration

Optional. If repo configured and `gh` authenticated:

| State | GitHub Label |
|---|---|
| todo | ready-for-agent |
| ready-for-agent | ready-for-agent |
| test-ready | test-ready |
| done | done |
| .quarantine | quarantine |

Auth check runs once per process (`sync.Once`). Falls back to local-only on failure.

## Checksum System

- SHA-256 hash of content excluding the `Checksum:` line
- `Checksum: <hex>` header maintained by loop
- Verify: `loop checksum verify`

## Architecture

```
cmd/loop/              # CLI entry point, arg parsing
internal/
  agent/               # opencode subprocess + promise parsing
  config/              # config load/save, project root detection
  gh/                  # raw gh CLI wrappers
  git/                 # stash, branch, context, commit
  github/              # label sync, issue reopen, release download
  issue/               # state machine, file parsing, transitions
  pipeline/            # legacy orchestration
  prompt/              # embedded agent system prompt
  runner/              # current orchestration (RunLoop, etc.)
  tui/dashboard/       # Bubbletea dashboard (5 pages)
  tui/run/             # streamed run output viewer
  tui/setup/           # interactive setup wizard
  tui/status/          # read-only status viewer
  tui/screenshot/      # ANSI-stripped screenshot saver
```

## Development

```
go test ./...        # run all tests
go vet ./...          # lint
make build            # build binary (Go 1.22+)
make install          # build + copy to $HOME/.local/bin/loop
make build-all        # cross-compile all platforms
```

### Releases

GoReleaser + GitHub Actions. `make release TAG=vX.Y.Z` triggers cross-compilation for:
- Linux (amd64, arm64) — `.tar.gz`
- macOS (amd64, arm64) — `.tar.gz`
- Windows (amd64) — `.zip`

### Key Source Files

- [`cmd/loop/main.go`](https://github.com/sambaths/loop/blob/main/cmd/loop/main.go) — CLI entry point, flag parsing, command dispatch
- [`internal/issue/issue.go`](https://github.com/sambaths/loop/blob/main/internal/issue/issue.go) — State machine, file format, transitions
- [`internal/agent/agent.go`](https://github.com/sambaths/loop/blob/main/internal/agent/agent.go) — opencode subprocess, sentinel parsing, watchdog
- [`internal/runner/runner.go`](https://github.com/sambaths/loop/blob/main/internal/runner/runner.go) — Iteration loop orchestration
- [`internal/git/git.go`](https://github.com/sambaths/loop/blob/main/internal/git/git.go) — Stash, branch, merge, context persistence
- [`internal/github/github.go`](https://github.com/sambaths/loop/blob/main/internal/github/github.go) — Label sync, issue reopen, release download
- [`internal/config/config.go`](https://github.com/sambaths/loop/blob/main/internal/config/config.go) — Config schema: repo, issue_dir, timeouts, checksums
- [`internal/prompt/prompt.go`](https://github.com/sambaths/loop/blob/main/internal/prompt/prompt.go) — Embedded agent system prompt
- [`.loop/config.json`](.loop/config.json) — Runtime configuration
- [`README.md`](https://github.com/sambaths/loop/blob/main/README.md) — User-facing documentation
- [`AGENTS.md`](https://github.com/sambaths/loop/blob/main/AGENTS.md) — Full LLM reference (project root)
- [`CODING_STANDARDS.md`](https://github.com/sambaths/loop/blob/main/CODING_STANDARDS.md) — Coding conventions
- [`CONTEXT.md`](https://github.com/sambaths/loop/blob/main/CONTEXT.md) — Compact glossary
